checks.requirement: Self-signup must be restricted to a pending member-only role payload.
checks.method: Static contract check against the access-request create rule.

checks.requirement: Self-updates for unapproved users must stay limited to safe profile fields.
checks.method: Static contract check against the safe self-update rule.

checks.requirement: Only the network super admin should be able to write church records.
checks.method: Static contract check against the churches collection rule.

checks.requirement: Only the network super admin should be able to create or change network-scope events.
checks.method: Static contract check against event create/update/delete rules.

checks.requirement: Team leaders and church managers should be able to maintain schedule assignments while members keep read-only team visibility.
checks.method: Static contract check against assignment read/write/update/delete rules.

checks.requirement: Notification device records must stay self-owned and church-scoped.
checks.method: Static contract check against notification-device rules.

checks.requirement: Team leaders should have church-scoped visibility into user records for planning.
checks.method: Static contract check against the users read rule.

checks.requirement: Access requests should be readable by the requester, church managers of the requested church, and super admins.
checks.method: Static contract check against access-request read/update rules.

checks.requirement: The user app should gate Firebase usage behind explicit configuration checks.
checks.method: Static configuration integrity check.

checks.requirement: The user app should resolve the Expo project id from either env vars or Expo/EAS runtime config.
checks.method: Static notification-config integrity check.

checks.requirement: The Android Google services file should be wired through the EAS file secret fallback.
checks.method: Static app-config integrity check.

checks.requirement: The admin app should gate Firebase usage behind explicit configuration checks.
checks.method: Static configuration integrity check.

checks.requirement: The admin web build should support the /admin/ hosting base path.
checks.method: Static hosting-config integrity check.

checks.requirement: The user web export should generate a deployable index and JavaScript bundle.
checks.method: Artifact presence check after Expo web export.

checks.requirement: The admin production build should generate deployable HTML, JS, and CSS assets.
checks.method: Artifact presence check after Vite production build.
checks.details: Found 1 admin JavaScript bundle(s) and 1 CSS bundle(s).

checks.requirement: The admin build should emit /admin/ asset paths for hosted deployment.
checks.method: Deployment-shape check against the built admin index.html.

checks.requirement: The built user and admin HTML shells should both include a root mount and boot script references.
checks.method: HTML shell smoke check against both built index files.

checks.requirement: The user web export total JavaScript should stay within the local 2.0 MB review budget.
checks.method: Measured the total size of emitted user-app JavaScript bundles.

checks.requirement: The largest admin JavaScript chunk should stay within the local 1.0 MB review budget.
checks.method: Measured the size of the largest emitted admin-app JavaScript bundle.
checks.details: Measured largest admin JS chunk: 673.5 KB.

checks.requirement: The admin CSS payload should stay within the local 150 KB review budget.
checks.method: Measured the total size of emitted admin CSS bundles.
